title: lithocarpus pachylepis
intro: Lithocarpus pachylepis, also known as the California nutmeg tree, is a species of tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pachylepis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune system function.
